rationale: Gov't Code §2001.007 governs internet publication of agency rules and explanatory materials. It is wholly unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. No conflict exists.
quote:
A state agency shall make available through a generally accessible Internet site:
(1) the text of its rules; and
(2) any material, such as a letter, opinion, or compliance manual, that explains or interprets one or more of its rules
_note: Rule text concerns agency internet publication requirements; no bearing on homestead exemption amounts.
